facts.text: Lists of the 'best movies ever made' vary widely because critics, audiences, filmmakers, and fans all judge greatness differently.
Citizen Kane spent decades atop many critics' polls and became a benchmark for cinematic ambition and innovation.
In the 2022 Sight & Sound critics' poll, Jeanne Dielman, 23 quai du Commerce, 1080 Bruxelles ranked at number one, replacing Vertigo from the previous poll.
Vertigo, The Godfather, Tokyo Story, 2001: A Space Odyssey, and Seven Samurai routinely appear near the top of major all-time film polls.
The American Film Institute's all-time list focuses specifically on American cinema rather than world cinema as a whole.
IMDb's Top 250 reflects user voting, which means its rankings often differ sharply from critic-driven lists.
The Shawshank Redemption has held the number one spot on IMDb's Top 250 for years thanks to strong fan enthusiasm.
The Godfather and The Godfather Part II are among the few films that appear on both critic and audience 'greatest ever' lists with remarkable consistency.
Casablanca is often praised as one of the most beloved classic Hollywood films ever made due to its dialogue, romance, and wartime atmosphere.
Seven Samurai influenced action, adventure, and ensemble storytelling across the world and is frequently cited among the greatest films ever made.
The 'best' film lists often shift over time as new generations reassess older classics and expand the canon beyond Hollywood.
Some movies become critical darlings immediately, while others take decades to be recognized as all-time greats.
Critics' polls, directors' polls, festival rankings, and audience votes often produce very different winners.
Parasite's rise into many all-time best lists showed how quickly a modern international film could enter the canon.
Animated films like Spirited Away and Toy Story increasingly appear on 'best ever' lists that once focused mostly on live-action dramas.
The question of the 'best movie ever' is one of the most argued subjects in film culture — and that debate is part of the fun.
Citizen Kane (1941) is regularly voted among the greatest films ever made.
Its structure, camerawork, and storytelling changed what many critics expected from cinema.
Citizen Kane is one of the signature titles or subjects people mention when discussing Voted Best Movies.

Citizen Kane helped define the tone and reputation of Voted Best Movies.
